title: State: Valkey support via the Redis component
body:
## Describe the feature

Test Valkey support via Dapr Redis component for supportability on versions:

* Tests on ValKey 8.0.2 first (and 9.0.0)
* Updating official documentation as required.

## Release Note

RELEASE NOTE:
